3023450.name: Postbound! Demo
3023450.description:
Postbound! is an arcade-style sorting game following your journey as a novice postal worker. In this casual, light-hearted, and family-friendly game filled with humor, you must correctly sort mail into the appropriate boxes before time runs out! The postmaster is there to help, at least when he's not sleeping. The post inspector comes by regularly to ensure you're doing your job, so don't get caught slacking!

Demo

In this demo, you have access to the core gameplay loop wherein you must sort letters into the correct postboxes.
